Pauldrons of Power  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 10
STR: +9 CHA: +9 WIS: +9 INT: +9 HP: +30 MANA: +30
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR PAL SHD NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ERU
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Pauldrons of Power
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 10
STR: +9 CHA: +9 WIS: +9 INT: +9 HP: +30 MANA: +30
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR PAL SHD NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ERU
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-08-08 10:06:31
Page Updated:Sat Feb 24th, 2024

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 58

# Dec 31 2002 at 12:37 PM Rating: Default

353 posts
and if this is the best, most constructive info you can post on these threads, then i'm afraid so are you.

need an AI filter on these things to prevent people from even posting this kind of garbage. just automatically "you cannot post that" when they try to.
▲ Page top
Pauldrons
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 5:19 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1621211041557
5 posts
Ok As it was myself who sent these in I thought i would comment... Im a 57 Paladin who got these when Innoruuk went down..

At present killing Innoruuk is very very hard, since his update a lot of servers still havent killed him at all, and of those that have only a few guilds on each are capable. So you wont see thses as common loot.

On our raid I was the only Erudite present ( We have an Erudite Cleric and a few Int casters but none were on the raid ) so I got the Pauldrons by default.

Now yes Imbued Granite Spaulders are nice.. but a:) I dont have them.. and b:) They are very heavy ( wt. 20 ). The Pauldrons are 2 AC less than my previous shoulders but in this case the extra Stats FAR outweight the loss of 2 AC... With Shield and Aegolism Im already over 1170 AC so losing about 3 real points hasent hurt.

Gaining 9 st However has added about 8 points to my ATK ( Equivalent of 2 levels advancement to a 50+ Paladin ). This helps...

To be honest if i had to give these shoulders an order of loot mine would be..

Enchanter
Wizard, Mage, Necromancer
Cleric
Paladin

Yes im putting myself far down the list.. but thats because better items are availible ( even though i dont have them )..


Oh and PS... I didnt create an Erudite for the Stalwart Shield.. my character is over 2 years old.. well before the Stalwart even appeared.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 30 2002 at 3:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Innoruuk curse your pally ***** These shoulders are ok, but basically i dont think anyone gives a ****. i mean, erudite only...can you say dont give a ****? i can.
RE: Pauldrons

__DEL__1591754590727

How can an enchanter get to level 60 without knowing anything about Erudites? Erudites are THE casters of Norrath. There isn't a single type of INT caster that an Erudite CANNOT be. I sincerely wish people would make sure they know what they are talking about before posting.

Get a clue
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2002 at 5:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763587688
144 posts
Erudites may be THE wizards of Norrath, but they are NOT THE chanters. High elves make FAR better enchanters than eru, period. 255 int is easy to get with gear (high end at least), 255 int and 255 cha is not. PLUS, HE enchanters got 15 more agi, and anyone that plays a chanter will tell you high AGI is VERY valuable when youre gettin quadded for 200. Helps you NOT get hit, period.

Just because eru start with 12 more int don't make them the best, hate to burst your bubble. Btw, I have a eru wiz :).

Plane of Air quest shoulders and Weight of the gods are easier to get.

▲ Page top
Innoruuk trash
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 5:01 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
No Erudite Paladin or Cleric would wear this utter trash over Imbued Granite Spaulders.

The overwhelming theme of the Innoruuk trash is that it has great stats (meaningless for meléé, of passing interest to casters) but average AC. For a melée where AC is everything this makes the Innoruuk stuff utter CRAP. Unless its a slot where the piece is traditionally low AC, even for melée.

So trolls (an earring) and gnomes (a ring) get a very nice piece for everyone but all the other races get caster only rubbish. And caster equipment means virtually nothing.

Hell, even for AC casters - Shaman and Clerics basically - these pieces are decidedly average when you consider the overall stats. I wouldn't switch an Erud Cleric or Paladin to this from IGS or even the PoS common drops.

Regards,
Eduin
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 7:08 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) by the way im an Iksar warrior and i got more ac than i need ok so you never have to much ac but for my level not a great many things can hit me. so now im looking for stat equip. ok i know this is a erudine only item but somewthing like would be nice for me altho some more str or stam would be good hehe.
RE: Innoruuk trash
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 9:56 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
LOL . . . sure he's a n00b, but he almost makes sense . . . almost. I don't see how a warrior can EVER feel he has enough AC. Especially an Iksar that can't wear plate.

At least Daakaera's not some anon flaming ******* though.
▲ Page top
RE: Innoruuk trash
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 10:49 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
but hes a n00b, right.

at lvl 27.

i guess ppl are n00bs until they hit 60 or at least YOUR level.

admit it, i AM right.

i hate high level people like you.
▲ Page top
RE: Innoruuk trash
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 10:36 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Iksar don't need to wear plate. And they can anyway, Verant screwed the pooch with Velious and almost every Plate armour in the continent is useable by the (now vastly superior) Iksar Warrior.

Any new Iksar Warrior should be taken to Thurgadin and equipped in a full set of Royal Velium Frosted Plate. It takes about 2 to 5 hours for the full set and is nearly superior to the Hate armour for non-Iksar (which is a pain to get).

As for stats, str, agi and dex are utterly meaningless. HP and Stamina are *nice* but never at the expense of more than a tiny amount of AC for large gains of HP. You can have all the HP you want but if that impairs your AC then you will die quickly.

Regards,
Eduin
▲ Page top
RE: Innoruuk trash
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 12:23 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591751638823
26 posts
Umm...Yous shush shush! Iksar warriors be pertty gud, me admit dat, but yous forgettin about us Trolls! We be far bettas dan dem lizerds. We bigger, we regen too, we see in dark and we gots da warrior stats dat count, strength and stamina. Now if yous say dem make betta sk's, well me will agrees, troll no gots much in da head, but warriors? Yous gots ta rethink dat opinion me tink. Oh yeah, dis nice shoulder piece. Gud for int casters. Me tink erudite sk would love dis piece of equiptment. Wit dis, him could gets himself udda armors and ditch some of his int gear.
▲ Page top
RE: Innoruuk trash
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 5:12 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Strength is meaningless in Everquest and if the HPs are what matters, Ogres are superior to trolls. MASSIVELY.

But HPs aren't what matter the most (and the advantage of Trolls and Ogres is *tiny* - if you play at level 60 in a ToV guild you *will* have 185 Stamina from their normal AC equipment - AND THAT IS CAPPED HP WITH Primal Essence and Riotous Health).

Stamina isn't importat - AC is and Iksar warriors have *by far* the highest AC in the game as Velious made it so that Iksars can wear the best, top end armour that non-Iksars can wear.

Regards,
Eduin
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2001 at 2:09 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
guy -- get a CLUE -- there are TONS of erudite only gear -- cazic cleric erudites get clickable effect gear VERY early in the game -- fear being one of the effects (which is nice to get mob off u and flee while not in dungeon). i believe there are 4 pieces in that line which is rated at a lvl 30 quest but can be multi-quested so can be dont VERY early in the warrens levels.

not to mention the midinight sea mail coat which is 15ac 3str 3wis erudite pally/cleric only. does that sound planar? lol

they were pointing out the erudite only gear -- NOT -- erudite only PLANAR gear.


think... then speak


Shred X'Soulreaver
Erudite SK
▲ Page top
Erudites
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 6:16 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361222477
Scholar
47 posts
Erudites can be wis casters. Not many people play them. Verant would like to see more diversity, ie: Not only halfling druids, maybe a human now and then.

A lot of this Erudite gear is of the specific intention of getting more people to play those classes.

Every single Erudite pally I've seen has a shield of the staltwart seas. That means that the strategy to get people to play Erudite Pallys by giving them great gear is working. So stop whining about it. Thats what the balance is all about. You want to play a race/class combo with the best starting stats, expect that you wont get the best gear in the game. If you are willing to be a little more original and diverse, you will get rewarded for it.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 05 2001 at 5:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WHATS UP WITH THEM, promoting Erudite clerics and pally's, SK's are good but erudites wisdom blows, so does there str for being a pally, if ya wanna be a pally or cleric, be a High elf for wisdom or a dwarf for str, sta and good wisdom. But im sorry, erudites just got crap for wisdom, intelligence casters are fine cause they got a crap load o dat, but wisdom, UGH...
RE: ERUDITE ONLY!
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 11:03 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Umm I'm sorry but I'm a Erudite Cleric.. from Paineel and my Wis is just fine thank you. Also Erudite are rare and fun to play. I had Adomite Epolats(sp?) for a long time from Lguk.. now I have the Obdulus Mantle from the Cube Crypt Caretaker(sp?). With all my items on me or in the bank I can get to 224 Wis... so no Wis is not a problem for the Erudite. With some item juggleing I'm at 200 Wis. I like item with big Wis on them so I can switch out my low wis item for AC/mana/resists. These Pauldrons would be a nice upgrade to what I have now.

Tekara Grimmhealer
56th Templar for Cazic-Thule
Cazic-Thule Server
▲ Page top
RE: ERUDITE ONLY!
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 12:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361220308
Scholar
70 posts
Preach it sister!

I wore banded armor from level 2 to 32, and had an amazing number of people examining me to see what that pretty purple-pink robe is. Now I wear a certain shade of amber plate, and people still don't realize I'm a cleric.

The fun of an Erudite wisdom caster comes from the uniqueness. This is a ROLE-PLAYING GAME! 95% of the Erudites running around are some kind of INT caster clone.

Uh oh. I think I just bashed Erudite INT casters on a thread for Erudite-only armor.


--

Zeah
40th Erudite Cleric of Quellious
Saryrn Server
